name: Sauteed Carrots with Almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat margarine in a large skillet.
2. Add carrots and sauté over moderate heat, stirring frequently, until tender-crisp and beginning to turn golden, about 10 to 15 minutes.
3. Add apple juice and continue to sauté, stirring until it is all absorbed.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients (lemon juice, chives, almonds).
5. Transfer the mixture to a serving container.
